summary: GH-92 implementation review approves the output-schema-only PR. It adds a package-local draft 2020-12 normalized output schema for structured content detail data, source/evidence refs, available/empty/unavailable states, and failure/result mapping metadata without adding fixtures, resource requirements, post-check logic, validator code, runtime behavior, or cross-repo changes.
reviewed_validation_summary: Local validation passed for `jq empty sites/example/read-public-page/manifest.json sites/example/read-public-page/schemas/output.schema.json .loom/bootstrap/init-result.json .loom/specs/GH-92/build-evidence.json`, `git diff --check`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-92 --json`, and `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-92 --json` at head `8708acf26151c6ec60d2dca94698b04daa8501e4`.
follow_ups: GH-93 must add package resource requirements before stable admission.
GH-95 and GH-97 must add fixture and post-check assets before validator/Core fixture consumption can close later FRs.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The reviewed implementation stays within GH-92 output schema and item-specific carrier scope, preserves read-only and no-secret boundaries, and leaves later resource, fixture, post-check, validator, registry, and Core-consuming work to their own Work Items.
